name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malicious Files Written to the Fonts Folder
notes:
This Building Block monitors for the hiding possible malicious files in the C:\Windows\Fonts\ location. This folder doesn't require admin privillege to be written and executed from.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Sreeman
SIGMA Title: Writing Of Malicious Files To The Fonts Folder
SIGMA Description: Monitors for the hiding possible malicious files in the C:\Windows\Fonts\ location. This folder doesn't require admin privillege to be written and executed from.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malicious Files Written to the Fonts Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%echo%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%type%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%file createnew%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cacls%') and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\windows\fonts\%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.sh%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bin%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cmd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.msh%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.reg%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.scr%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ps%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vb%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.jar%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pl%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.inf%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cpl%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.hta%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.msi%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vbs%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malicious Files Written to the Fonts Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%echo%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%type%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%file createnew%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cacls%') and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\windows\fonts\%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.sh%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bin%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bat%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cmd%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.js%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.msh%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.reg%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.scr%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ps%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vb%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.jar%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pl%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.inf%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cpl%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.hta%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.msi%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vbs%') AQL filter query
